chat_messages.text: Can you create a comparison table of sorting algorithms?

content.thinking: The user wants a comparison table of sorting algorithms. I should cover the most common ones — bubble, quick, merge, heap, insertion — and include time complexity, space complexity, and stability...

content.text:
Here's a comprehensive comparison table of sorting algorithms:

| Algorithm   | Best Case  | Average Case | Worst Case | Space    | Stable |
| ----------- | ---------- | ------------ | ---------- | -------- | ------ |
| Bubble Sort | O(n)       | O(n²)        | O(n²)      | O(1)     | Yes    |
| Quick Sort  | O(n log n) | O(n log n)   | O(n²)      | O(log n) | No     |
| Merge Sort  | O(n log n) | O(n log n)   | O(n log n) | O(n)     | Yes    |
